description: A vulnerability was determined in SourceCodester Hotel and Lodge Management System 1.0. This affects an unknown part of the file /pages/save_tax.php. Executing manipulation of the argument percentage can lead to sql injection. It is possible to launch the attack remotely. The exploit has been publicly disclosed and may be utilized.
